question: What is the primary defense of the creatures populating the Subterranean Caves?

answers.ground_truth: The primary defense of the Glow-worms in the Subterranean Caves is emitting blinding flashes of light when threatened.
answers.original: The primary defense of the creatures populating the Subterranean Caves includes emitting blinding flashes of light and retracting into an impenetrable mineralized shell.
answers.perturbed: The primary defense of the creatures populating the Subterranean Caves is the blinding flashes of light emitted by Glow-worms when threatened.

entities.name: Mineral Deposits
entities.description: Mineral deposits are found within the Subterranean Caves and serve as a food source for Glow-worms.

entities.name: Stone-Shells
entities.description: Stone-Shells are creatures that retract into an impenetrable mineralized shell when threatened.

entities.name: Unique Fauna
entities.description: Unique fauna are animal species found within the Subterranean Caves.

entities.name: Subterranean Caves
entities.description: The Subterranean Caves are a network of deep tunnels filled with unique flora, fauna, and mineral formations.<SEP>The Subterranean Caves are a network of deep tunnels filled with unique flora and fauna, known for hosting various creatures.

entities.name: Glow-Worms
entities.description: Glow-worms are small, segmented creatures found in the Subterranean Caves that emit blinding flashes of light when threatened.<SEP>Glow-Worms are creatures that emit blinding flashes of light when threatened, temporarily disorienting predators.

relations.description: The Subterranean Caves are home to Stone-Shells, which use their mineralized shells as a defense mechanism.
The Subterranean Caves are home to unique fauna.
